properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v4 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Is anyone thirsty, Anyone, Is anyone thirsty, Anyone, Is anyone thirsty, Anyone, Is anyone thirsty.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus said, "Let them come to me and drink, Let them come to me."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: Let the living water flow, Let the living water flow, Let the river of your Spirit flow through me. :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let the living water flow, Let the living water flow, Let the living water flow, Let the living water flow.
